meta.title: Café Luna · coffee & brunch in Brno
meta.description: Coffee, brunch and a small bistro in Brno-Vinohrady. Special brunch menu every Sunday. Book online.

announcement.text: This weekend: Pancake Sunday — banana pancakes with maple syrup. Reserve

hero.label: Coffee · brunch · Brno-Vinohrady
hero.sub: Café Luna is where you come for an espresso, stay for shakshuka, and return because it just feels right.

menu.label: Menu
menu.title: What we're cooking today
menu.lead: Kitchen until 2 PM, coffee all day. Full menu in-house — these are the favorites.

brunch.label: Sunday Brunch
brunch.title: Every Sunday from 9 AM
brunch.text: Pancakes, shakshuka, eggs benedict and house croissant. €22 per person — eat as much as you want. Reservation required.
